title: Rodrigo Estrella
text:
Data Scientist & BI Developer con Magíster en Economía y más de 5 años de experiencia construyendo soluciones analíticas de alto impacto. Especialista en R, Shiny y SQL. Apasionado por el puente entre la econometría y el business intelligence escalable. Data Scientist & BI Developer with an MA in Economics and over 5 years of experience delivering high-impact analytical solutions. Specialist in R, Shiny, and SQL, focused on building end-to-end data products that drive data-informed decision-making.



TGA | BPtL — BPtL Intelligence Leader | Jun 2021 – PresentePresent

Lideré la transformación del producto core reemplazando flujos manuales en Excel por pipelines ETL automatizados en R y cron jobs, reduciendo el tiempo de generación de reportes un 90%.Led the transformation of the organization’s core product by replacing manual Excel workflows with automated ETL pipelines using R and cron jobs, reducing report generation time by 90%.
Desarrollé un framework de regresión automatizado con tidymodels, reduciendo errores manuales un 70% y mejorando la precisión del modelo un 15%.Developed an automated regression analysis framework using tidymodels, decreasing manual errors by 70% and improving model precision by 15%.
Construí 4 dashboards Shiny interactivos con análisis de texto automatizado y modelos predictivos, permitiendo generar insights 2× más rápido.Engineered 4 interactive Shiny dashboards featuring automated text analysis and predictive modeling, enabling stakeholders to generate custom insights 2× faster.
Integré la API de ChatGPT en herramientas internas para automatizar resúmenes de texto y mejorar el data storytelling.Integrated ChatGPT API into internal reporting tools to automate text summarization and enhance data storytelling.

Millán SA — BI Consultant | Jan 2020 – PresentePresent

Implementé Power BI en múltiples unidades de negocio; el dashboard de monitoreo de stock-loss redujo el faltante un 10%.Implemented Power BI across multiple business units; flagship stock-loss monitoring dashboard led to a 10% reduction in inventory shrinkage.
Estimaciones de demanda para productos de supermercado usando modelos de elección discreta en R.Performed complex demand estimations for supermarket retail products using discrete choice models in R.
Desarrollé una aplicación Shiny con backend MongoDB para ingesta automatizada de datos desde archivos de texto.Developed a custom Shiny application with a MongoDB backend for automated data ingestion and reporting.
Construí un motor de web scraping para monitorear precios de competidores de forma interactiva.Built a web scraping engine to monitor competitor pricing interactively, enabling dynamic pricing strategy adjustments.




ProgramaciónProgramming: R (Shiny, Plumber, Tidyverse, Tidymodels), SQL, Python, Stata
Ingeniería de datosData Engineering: Docker, MongoDB, GitHub/Git, Web Scraping (rvest, RSelenium), Cron Jobs
VisualizaciónVisualization & BI: Power BI, Shiny (Fluent/Router), Highcharter, Plotly, CSS/HTML
EconomíaEconomics: Econometría, Modelos de Elección Discreta, Estimación de DemandaEconometrics, Discrete Choice Models, Demand Estimation
IdiomasLanguages: Inglés (Avanzado) · Italiano (Intermedio) · Español (Nativo)English (Advanced) · Italian (Intermediate) · Spanish (Native)




Algorithmic Atelier: UI/UX sofisticada construida con shiny.fluent y shiny.router, con internacionalización (shiny.i18n).Sophisticated UI/UX built with shiny.fluent and shiny.router, showcasing high-end R development and internationalization.
Car Scraper & Assistant: Herramienta end-to-end con scraping en tiempo real, consumo de APIs y asistente de chat con OpenAI.End-to-end tool integrating real-time web scraping, API consumption (exchange rates), and an OpenAI-powered chat assistant.
Wine Monitor: App full-stack con scrapers Docker en GCP, MongoDB y Shiny para monitoreo e-commerce.Full-stack monitoring app using Dockerized scrapers on GCP, MongoDB, and Shiny to track e-commerce data.




Magíster en EconomíaMA in Economics — Universidad Alberto Hurtado, Chile (2019)
Licenciado en EconomíaBachelor’s Degree in Economics — Universidad Nacional de Cuyo, Argentina (2017)

title: Rodrigo Estrella
text:
Professional Profile
Data Leader and MA in Economics with over 5 years of experience delivering high-impact analytical solutions. Specialist in R, Shiny, and SQL, focused on building end-to-end data products that reduce operational costs and improve efficiency. Expert at bridging the gap between complex econometric modeling and scalable business intelligence to drive data-informed decision-making.

title: Rodrigo Estrella
text:
Professional Experience

TGA | BPtL June 2021 – Present


BPtL Intelligence Leader


Process Automation: Led the transformation of the organization’s core product by replacing manual Excel workflows with automated ETL pipelines using R and cron jobs, reducing report generation time by 90%.
Statistical Modeling: Developed an automated regression analysis framework using tidymodels, decreasing manual errors by 70% and improving model precision by 15%.
Product Development: Engineered 4 interactive Shiny dashboards featuring automated text analysis and predictive modeling, enabling stakeholders to generate custom insights 2x faster.
AI Integration: Integrated ChatGPT API into internal reporting tools and dashboards to automate text summarization and enhance data storytelling.


Millán SA January 2020 – Present


BI Consultant


Strategic BI: Implemented Power BI across multiple business units, developing a flagship stock-loss monitoring dashboard that led to a 10% reduction in inventory shrinkage.
Advanced Analytics: Performed complex demand estimations for supermarket retail products using discrete choice models in R.
Full-stack Data Solution: Developed a custom Shiny application with a MongoDB backend for automated data ingestion and reporting from plain text files.
Market Intelligence: Built a web scraping engine to monitor competitor pricing in real-time, enabling dynamic pricing strategy adjustments.

title: Rodrigo Estrella
text:
Technical Skills

Programming: R (Shiny, Plumber, Tidyverse, Tidymodels), SQL (Advanced), Python (Basics), Stata.
Data Engineering & Ops: Docker, MongoDB, GitHub/Git, Web Scraping (rvest, RSelenium), Cron Jobs.
Visualization & BI: Power BI, Shiny (Fluent/Router), Highcharter, Plotly, CSS/HTML.
Economics & Strategy: Econometrics, Discrete Choice Models, Demand Estimation, Financial Reporting.
Languages: English (Advanced), Italian (Intermediate), Spanish (Native).

title: Rodrigo Estrella
text:
Featured Projects

Algorithmic Atelier: A sophisticated UI/UX project developed with shiny.fluent and shiny.router, showcasing high-end R development and internationalization (shiny.i18n).
Car Scraper & Assistant: An end-to-end tool integrating real-time web scraping, API consumption (exchange rates), and an OpenAI-powered chat assistant for decision support.
Wine Monitor: A full-stack monitoring app using Dockerized scrapers on GCP, MongoDB, and Shiny to track e-commerce data.
